identity.name: Ordnungsamt & Abschlepp Management
identity.archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Modified for Public Service)

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode B: High Density for Dashboards)

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm font-medium px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:border-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium px-6 py-3

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

inputs.style: h-12 border-2 border-slate-200 focus:border-slate-900 focus:ring-0 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white transition-colors font-medium text-lg

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on dashboard backgrounds to reduce sterility.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Crisp, low-blur shadows (shadow-sm) to mimic physical paper/cards.

animations.scan: A scanning line animation for the license plate search input.

landing_hero.usage: Blurred background for the Citizen Search Hero section. Overlay with dark gradient.

authority_dashboard_bg.usage: Login page for Authorities or Header background.

landing.structure: Hero (Search Bar Centered) -> How it Works -> Map Preview -> Footer
landing.key_feature: License Plate Search Input - Make it look like a physical license plate (FE-font).

dashboard_authority.structure: Sidebar (Desktop) / Bottom Nav (Mobile) -> Job Creation Form -> Active Map -> List of Towed Cars

dashboard_towing.structure: Job Feed (Cards) -> Job Detail View -> Status Action Bar (Sticky Bottom)
dashboard_towing.key_feature: Big, thumb-friendly status buttons (On Site, Towed).

dashboard_admin.structure: Data Grid (TanStack Table) -> Analytics Widgets -> User Management

technical_instructions.pdf_generation: Use a server-side generation approach (mocked for now) or client-side 'react-pdf' if needed.
universal_rules: Use 'Public Sans' for all body text.
Ensure high contrast (WCAG AA) for outdoor usage.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid colors or subtle textures.
All interactive elements must have data-testid.
